title: 以下、スタックしている？ › 完遂せよ。マルチエージェントがマストの/kernel で進めて • Kernel orchestration is active for this session. Bootstrap target: requirements packet -> simulation gate -> hands-off execution. Active models: gpt-5, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.3- codex, GLM general-reviewer, Copilot Lane manifest: - Main lane: 統合と実装 - 残る...
summary_text: `packet survives` (with one critical compatibility gap to resolve explicitly) - Evidence: monitoring auth is already implemented for `/health` as `MONITORING_API_KEY` first, then `ADMIN_API_KEY` fallback (in `src/handlers/health.ts`), and `Ops Watchdog` is the only workflow currently hard-wired to `WORKERS_API_KEY` (`.github/workflows/ops-watchdog.yml`), so the proposed narrow swap targets the intended surface. - Hidden dependency risk: if `Ops Watchdog` is changed to strict `MONITORING_API_KEY` usage, any deployment that only has `ADMIN_API_KEY` set (and no `MONITORING_API_KEY`) will lose watchdog coverage unless it is explicitly treated as acceptable (skip or fallback). This is a real failure mode because health endpoint still permits ADMIN auth. - Acceptance gap: `sync-secrets.yml` does not currently propagate `MONITORING_API_KEY` at all. Adding it is required, but should include env parity (`hub`/`canary`) and a missing-secret guard consistent with intended failure behavior.
